title: rubus virgultorum
intro: Rubus virgultorum is a species of bramble, a type of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The plant is also said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Rubus virgultorum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
